title: lathyrus luteus subsp. hispanicus
intro: Lathyrus luteus subsp. hispanicus, also known as the yellow pea or Spanish vetchling, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Lathyrus luteus subsp. hispanicus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
